interpretation: A pass would promote Llama-8B to a full source-family gate on all ARC validation/test rows. A failure would cheaply rule out the only locally cached true non-Qwen stronger source as the next Mac-local ARC repair, leaving NVIDIA-scale connector training or a new cached source as the live branch.
lay_explanation: This run asks whether a much stronger non-Qwen local source model can choose better ARC answers on the hard rows where TinyLlama and Qwen disagreed. Only the chosen answer is converted into the same tiny 12-byte packet; Llama hidden states, text, and KV cache are not transmitted.

method_contract.frozen_surface: TinyLlama-vs-Qwen source-family disagreement rows from seed 47

pass_rule: Scout pass requires validation and frozen test matched Llama-8B packets to beat Qwen-substituted and cached-Tiny packet controls by >= configured margins with positive paired CI95 lower bounds, and to beat rolled/random source-choice controls by >= configured margins.

anchor_control_metadata.interpretation: source and receiver share the same deterministic train-anchor coordinate chart
source and receiver share the same deterministic train-anchor coordinate chart
